title: never-stale per-project opt-in marker
description: Presence of this file (with enabled:true) at <project root>/.claude/ is how the plugin-owned hooks know to act in this project. .claude/never-stale.json is committed (team-shared); .claude/never-stale.local.json is gitignored (machine-local, and overrides the committed one). A corrupt or missing marker is treated as DISABLED.

enabled.description: Must be exactly true for the hooks to act. Anything else = disabled.

version.description: never-stale version that wrote this marker, e.g. "0.6.0".

spoken.description: Spoken-reply language recorded at scaffold time (human display string; informational, the rule itself lives in CLAUDE.md).

spokenCode.description: Canonical code for the spoken language, for stable comparison across markers (the display string can drift). Known values: "en", "zh-Hant", "zh-HK", "zh-Hans"; omit for an "Other" language. Informational.

written.description: Default written-file language recorded at scaffold time (human display string; informational).

writtenCode.description: Canonical code for the written-file language. Known values: "en", "zh-Hant", "zh-HK", "zh-Hans"; omit for an "Other" language. Informational.

events.description: Per-event switches. Omit an event or set true to keep it on; set false to turn just that reminder off.

syncPairs.description: Optional drift-detection pairs (v0.9.0+). Each entry pairs a `source` doc (a ledger/changelog that grows) with a `snapshot` doc that is meant to stay reconciled to it. When a snapshot has fallen behind, the gate appends an advisory drift note on compact and retargets the reminder when you edit the source. Absent or empty => behaviour identical to before. NOTE: the repo's zero-dependency schema test cannot validate array ITEMS — the per-item shape, safe-regex, and path-confinement guards live in test/syncpairs.test.mjs, not here.

source.description: Repo-relative path to the source doc (the ledger). Must NOT be absolute, drive-qualified, UNC, or parent-escaping (..); such a path is silently ignored by the gate.

snapshot.description: Repo-relative path to the snapshot doc that should track the source.

mode.description: How drift is measured. "mtime" (default, v0.9.0+): the source was edited more recently than the snapshot — a heuristic, no file read. "hash" (v0.10.0+): the snapshot embeds a synced-to marker `<!-- never-stale:synced-to <hex> -->` declaring the source content it last reconciled to; the gate hashes the source's normalized content (a bounded, compact-only read, no user regex) and flags a mismatch. "declared"/"version" are reserved for a later release and are treated as a silent no-op for now.

sourceVersionRe.description: Reserved for the "version" mode (not yet active): a regex with one capture group extracting the source's current version.

snapshotSyncedRe.description: Reserved for the "version" mode (not yet active): a regex with one capture group extracting the version the snapshot declares it is synced to.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the marker was written (informational).
